title: Sub-Items - Filtering and Sorting

posts.author: dlawrencer24 (Dan Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: Finding that you are unable to sort or filter by Sub-Items when trying to filter out a sub-item status column. Very restrictive in trying to use our boards and create notification automations based on those sub-item status’.
